name: Wellco Holdings Corporation
summary: Wellco Holdings Corporation, through its subsidiaries, engages in the commercial printing business. The company produces and sells industrial and commercial printing products; and offers information services, advertising printing products, sales promotion items, etc. Its products and services include direct mail formats, products with privacy protection measures, eco-friendly products, flyers, booklets, labels, and novelty products, as well as DTP. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Hakusan, Japan.
